examples: And, almost uniquely, their menfolk have the same average lifespan as their women-71 years.
With the menfolk away at war, women got their first crack at the male preserves of employment and sport.
Despite the best efforts of menfolk across a thousand generations, this adolescent female amoeba cannot be dispelled.
When tiresome menfolk call them on their mobiles, the lies come tripping.
In a period of rapid social change, women were beginning to find personal freedom, empowering themselves while leaving generally confused menfolk in their wake.
